item.title: Why Iran should not count on allies Russia and China to come to its aid
item.description: Iran's closest allies, Russia and China, have not offered material support to it, exposing the hard limits of its "strategic" partnerships.

item.title: Iran conflict: Where things stand, global responses — and what comes next
item.description: The U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran is extending into its third day with each side pledging escalation.

item.title: Are Jack Dorsey's aggressive job cuts the start of an AI jobs apocalypse? Economists weigh in
item.description: Economists question whether such moves signal a broader shift in the labor market or simply reflect company-specific adjustments.

item.title: Core wholesale prices rose 0.8% in January, much more than expected
item.description: The core producer price index increased a seasonally adjusted 0.8%, more than the 0.6% gain in December.

item.title: Trump insists trade deals safe after Supreme Court ruling upends tariff authority, but partners aren’t so sure
item.description: The Supreme Court decision to strike down Trump's tariffs has thrown fresh confusion over the raft of trade deals negotiated with global partners, sta...
